title: About DOEON LAB
paragraphs: DOEON LAB pioneers next-generation neuromorphic vision systems by seamlessly merging sensing, optical modulation, and computation. To enable ultra-low-power, real-time perception for edge AI and robotics, our core research focuses on in-sensor computing for eliminating data bottlenecks, metasurface optical encoders for advanced computational sensing, and heterogeneous integration of III-V semiconductors for novel flexible device form factors.

Join Us! We are actively looking for passionate individuals to join our journey. We warmly welcome undergraduate students, MS/PhD candidates, and post-doctoral researchers to pioneer the future of optoelectronics and machine vision with us. If you are interested in our research or potential opportunities, please feel free to contact us anytime at leedoun [at] hanyang.ac.kr.
